summary: A Fox News segment featuring Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons speaking via live remote about Chicago, intercut with B-roll of ICE enforcement arrests. It carries Fox News chyrons ('ICE UNDER ATTACK', 'STOKING HATRED') and is a talking-head news interview.
notable_text: Fox News lower-thirds: 'ICE UNDER ATTACK / VIOLENCE AGAINST IMMIGRATION OFFICERS HAS SURGED'; 'STOKING HATRED / CHICAGO MAYOR CLAIMS ICE AGENTS TERRORIZE COMMUNITIES'; 'TODD LYONS | ACTING ICE DIRECTOR'.
